title: STATISTICAL ANALYSIS OF THE INHIBITORY EFFECTS OF LACTOFERRIN AGAINST MULTI-DRUG RESISTANT PATHOGENS
author: HASAN, Asaad Kareem Hasan
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: The transferrin family of proteins includes lactoferrins, which bind iron. Since their initial isolation from both bovine and human milk, lactoferrins have undergone extensive structural and functional investigations.
steps_raw: The transferrin family of proteins includes lactoferrins, which bind iron. Since their initial isolation from both bovine and human milk, lactoferrins have undergone extensive structural and functional investigations.
